description.value:
An exotic weapon that combines a recurve bow with integrated blade edges along the limbs, allowing the user to slash at close-range threats. Mastery of this weapon allows fluid movement through enemy lines.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d6 (60/240), Piercing
BasicTwo-Handed, Finesse, Heavy, Melee d6, Ranged d8 (120/600), Piercing or Slashing
MasterTwo-Handed, Finesse, Heavy, Melee d6, Ranged d8 (120/600), Piercing or Slashing, fluid movement
Master PerkWhile this weapon is equipped, your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks.

rmeData.masterPerk: While this weapon is equipped, your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks.
